---
title: "About"
---

## murkml

Cross-site suspended sediment concentration (SSC) prediction using CatBoost and Bayesian site adaptation.

**Model:** v10-clean-dualbcf — 254 training sites, 72 features, Box-Cox lambda=0.2, dual BCF.

**Author:** Kaleb — University of Idaho, Water Science and Management.

**Paper:** In preparation for Water Resources Research.

**Code:** [github.com/Whiteaeros/murkml](https://github.com/Whiteaeros/murkml)

---

## Project History

Generated from git forensic analysis of 100+ commits (2026-03-15 to 2026-03-31) cross-referenced against DECISION_LOG.md.

### Model Evolution DAG

The ancestry of v10, with every dead-end branch and the state transition that caused each version jump.

```{mermaid}
graph TD
    FEAS["Kansas Feasibility<br/>5 sites, 2362 SSC samples<br/>92.6% match rate at 15min<br/>Concept validated"]
    POC["POC<br/>3 sites, 10 feat<br/>Per-site OLS R2=0.92"]
    S17["17-site<br/>17 sites, 20 feat<br/>LOGO R2=0.84<br/>Cross-site transfer proven"]
    AUDIT["4-Reviewer Code Audit<br/>Timezone off 5-8hrs<br/>Early-stop leakage<br/>Median imputation leak<br/>Garbage dQ/dt features"]
    S57["57-site post-audit<br/>57 sites, 30 feat<br/>R2=0.63 to 0.75 from tz fix"]
    V1["v1<br/>102 sites, 99 feat<br/>R2 log=0.721, nat=0.295<br/>GAGES-II silently broken"]
    V2["v2<br/>243 sites, 37 feat<br/>R2 nat=0.361<br/>Holdout=0.699"]
    V3["v3<br/>346 sites, 37 feat<br/>R2 nat=0.154 COLLAPSED"]
    V4["v4 Stable Platform<br/>357 sites, 44 feat<br/>Box-Cox 0.2, Monotone ON<br/>R2 log=0.718, Holdout=0.472"]
    V9["v9 CONTAMINATED<br/>254 train, 72 feat<br/>Trained on holdout+vault<br/>ALL EVALS INVALID"]
    V10["v10 CURRENT BEST<br/>254 train, 72 feat<br/>R2=0.756, KGE=0.777<br/>Holdout MedR2=0.393<br/>Adapted N=10 R2=0.492"]

    FEAS -->|"Proves 15min alignment works"| POC
    POC -->|"First cross-site model"| S17
    S17 -->|"Red team finds 4 bugs"| AUDIT
    AUDIT -->|"R2 jumps 0.12 from tz fix alone"| S57
    S57 -->|"Expand to 11 states<br/>GAGES-II broken but unknown"| V1
    V1 -->|"prune_gagesii bug found<br/>StreamCat replaces GAGES-II<br/>Ablation 99 to 37 feat"| V2
    V2 -->|"QC approval code fix<br/>+117 sites, native R2 collapses"| V3
    V3 -->|"24-exp transform sweep<br/>Box-Cox 0.2 wins"| V4
    V4 -->|"+SGMC lithology, 3-way split<br/>72 feat locked by expert panel<br/>Bayesian adaptation integrated"| V9
    V9 -->|"Contamination discovered<br/>Dual BCF, 135 records cleaned<br/>Proper holdout exclusion"| V10

    S17 -->|"Multi-param tested"| MPARAM["Multi-Param Dead End<br/>TP R2=0.62 at 42 sites<br/>collapsed to 0.08 at 72<br/>Nitrate=-0.72, OrthoP=-1.31<br/>Dissolved not predictable from turb"]

    S57 -->|"14-state validation"| EXT1["Early External Validation<br/>20 sites, 14 states<br/>Median R2=0.61<br/>Best NY=0.90, MN=0.90"]

    V3 -->|"Transform crisis"| TSWEEP
    subgraph TSWEEP ["Transform Sweep - 24 experiments"]
        direction TB
        TS1["Raw SSC - R2 under 0.012, ruled out"]
        TS2["log1p + monotone - R2 nat=0.217, monotone hurts"]
        TS3["Box-Cox MLE - lambda near 0, BCF=1.675"]
        TS4["Box-Cox 0.2 + monotone - R2 nat=0.241, WINNER"]
        TS5["Fine sweep 0.15-0.25 - Peak at 0.18-0.20"]
    end

    V4 -->|"Fair comparison"| V5["v5 log1p fair test<br/>Same data, Holdout=0.460<br/>Transform barely matters<br/>v2-to-v4 drop was data not transform"]

    V4 -->|"Loss function exps"| LOSS
    subgraph LOSS ["Loss Function - all failed"]
        direction TB
        LKGE["KGE eval_metric<br/>Same R2, fewer trees<br/>No improvement"]
        LSQRT["Sqrt sample weights<br/>R2 log 0.718 to 0.528<br/>Trees collapsed 281 to 86"]
        LLIN["Linear sample weights<br/>R2 nat=0.004, 17 trees<br/>Catastrophic"]
    end

    V4 -->|"Architecture search"| ARCH
    subgraph ARCH ["Architecture Search"]
        direction TB
        V6["v6 MERF<br/>Holdout=0.417<br/>Lost categoricals, SHAP rank 3"]
        V8GPB["v8-gpb GPBoost<br/>Holdout=0.145<br/>LightGBM too weak"]
        V8MERF["v8-merf CatBoost-MERF EM<br/>Holdout=0.144<br/>EM corrupts fixed effects<br/>BCF inflated to 1.88"]
        V8POST["v8-post Bayesian<br/>N=3 R2=0.485<br/>Zero-shot preserved at 0.472<br/>BREAKTHROUGH"]
    end
    V8POST -.->|"Post-hoc approach kept<br/>CatBoost untouched +<br/>Bayesian from residuals"| V9

    V4 -->|"Adaptation method"| ADAPT
    subgraph ADAPT ["Adaptation Evolution"]
        direction TB
        AD_OLD["Old 2-param linear<br/>N=2 R2=-0.012 catastrophic<br/>No shrinkage, overfits"]
        AD_BAYES["Bayesian Student-t k=15 df=4<br/>N=2 R2=0.485, delta +0.497<br/>Staged: intercept N under 10<br/>slope+intercept N over 10"]
        AD_N20["N=20 collapse found<br/>36% draws have zero storms<br/>Cap reporting at N=10"]
        AD_OLD --> AD_BAYES
        AD_BAYES --> AD_N20
    end
    AD_BAYES -.->|"Bayesian adaptation<br/>is the product"| V9

    V4 -->|"30+ experiments"| EXPS
    subgraph EXPS ["Experiments A-E"]
        direction TB
        EXPA["Exp A - Method split<br/>7 models, all worse than v4<br/>Model knows via SHAP rank 3"]
        EXPB["Exp B - Site exclusion<br/>Pooled up 0.211 to 0.324<br/>Per-site DOWN 0.290 to 0.236<br/>Aggregate metrics lie"]
        EXPC["Exp C - Flow stratification<br/>NOT a flow problem<br/>Site heterogeneity at ALL regimes"]
        EXPD["Exp D - Site count<br/>200 sweet spot, 96 too few<br/>Pooled and per-site tell<br/>OPPOSITE stories at every scale"]
        EXPE["Exp E - MERF concept<br/>Led to architecture search"]
    end

    V4 -->|"Feature engineering"| FEAT
    subgraph FEAT ["Feature Decisions"]
        direction TB
        F_SGMC["SGMC lithology 28 feat<br/>Net flat aggregate dR2=-0.007<br/>5 categories p under 0.05<br/>Panel unanimous: keep"]
        F_WEATHER["Weather features<br/>+0.008 R2 log<br/>DROP destroys extreme events<br/>despite improving median"]
        F_LONLAT["Longitude kept, latitude dropped<br/>lon=maritime-continental physics<br/>lat+lon together memorize geography"]
        F_COLLECT["Collection method resolution<br/>5536 unknowns resolved via WQP<br/>88% fixed, unknown 6282 to 746"]
    end
    F_SGMC -.-> V9
    F_WEATHER -.-> V9

    V4 -->|"Feature ablation"| ABL
    subgraph ABL ["Feature Ablation - 3 rounds"]
        direction TB
        ABL1["Round 1: 102 to 62 to 37<br/>R2 log only, missed native conflicts"]
        ABL2["Round 2: 83 single-feature<br/>Multi-metric GKF5<br/>Native effects 10-100x larger than log"]
        ABL3["Round 3: Group ablation<br/>5-seed stability p=0.81<br/>Expert panel locks at 72"]
        ABL1 --> ABL2 --> ABL3
    end
    ABL3 -.->|"72 features locked<br/>65 on drop list"| V9

    V4 -->|"Data investigations"| DATA
    subgraph DATA ["Data Decisions"]
        direction TB
        D_NTU["NTU investigation<br/>89 dual-sensor sites found<br/>Zero temporal overlap<br/>NTU=1976-2005, FNU=2006+<br/>Panel unanimous: validation only"]
        D_NOISE["Noise site analysis<br/>Drop 15 worst: first flush<br/>R2 collapses 0.905 to 0.264<br/>NEVER drop training sites"]
        D_CLEAN["Data cleaning<br/>135 anomalous records removed<br/>SSC/turb ratio above 200 or below 0.01<br/>Includes SSC=70000 at turb=260"]
        D_3WAY["3-way split created<br/>284 train / 76 holdout / 36 vault<br/>47+ ablation exps = implicit overfit<br/>Krishnamurthy identified"]
        D_ANCHOR["Anchor site investigation<br/>50 curated beat 287 on per-site<br/>Gemini found data leak in selection"]
    end
    D_3WAY -.-> V9
    D_CLEAN -.-> V10

    V9 -->|"BCF investigation"| BCF
    subgraph BCF ["BCF Evolution"]
        direction TB
        BCF_DUAN["Duan smearing - only valid for log"]
        BCF_SNOW["Snowdon ratio - transform-agnostic"]
        BCF_BIN["Binned BCF - R2 0.216 to 0.210, no help"]
        BCF_DUAL["Dual BCF<br/>bcf_mean=1.327 for loads<br/>bcf_median=1.021 for predictions<br/>3 reviewers found 1.44x overprediction"]
        BCF_DUAN --> BCF_SNOW
        BCF_SNOW --> BCF_BIN
        BCF_BIN --> BCF_DUAL
    end
    BCF_DUAL -.->|"Dual BCF integrated"| V10

    V10 -->|"External validation"| EXT2["260 NTU Sites<br/>11K samples, 6 organizations<br/>Spearman=0.927 zero-shot<br/>N=10 adaptation R2=0.501<br/>Cross-network proven"]

    V10 -->|"Paper analyses"| PAPER
    subgraph PAPER ["Paper Ready"]
        direction TB
        P_OLS["OLS benchmark<br/>CatBoost wins at every N<br/>N=2 temporal: 0.36 vs -0.56"]
        P_CI["Bootstrap CIs 1000 resamples<br/>MedR2=0.409 CI 0.144-0.459"]
        P_CQR["CQR MultiQuantile<br/>Romano et al 2019<br/>Currently training"]
    end

    S17 -->|"Scientific discovery"| DISC
    subgraph DISC ["Key Scientific Findings"]
        direction TB
        SC_BOUNDARY["Dissolved vs particulate boundary<br/>Particle params transfer cross-site<br/>Dissolved do not, physics limit<br/>Per-site OLS ceilings 0.04-0.06"]
        SC_TURB["Nobody uses turbidity in<br/>large-scale ML models<br/>All published work uses hydromet only<br/>Continuous turb is THE advantage"]
        SC_SONG["Song et al 2024 benchmark<br/>377 sites LSTM PUB R2=0.55<br/>murkml R2=0.80, delta +0.25"]
        SC_OLS["Death of OLS<br/>CatBoost + 2 samples R2=0.48<br/>beats USGS OLS + 50 samples R2=0.40"]
        SC_IOWA["Iowa River SSC/TP split<br/>SSC fails R2=-0.50, TP works R2=0.69<br/>Turb tracks fine P-bearing fraction<br/>Publishable finding"]
        SC_GKF["GKF5 vs holdout disagreement<br/>turb_Q_ratio: +0.004 GKF5 vs -0.102 holdout<br/>CV folds lack geology diversity<br/>Major methodological finding"]
    end

    V10 -->|"Strategic decisions"| STRAT
    subgraph STRAT ["Strategic Decisions"]
        direction TB
        ST_WRITE["Stop improving, start writing<br/>All 4 reviewers unanimous<br/>Submitted 0.80 beats unsubmitted 0.83"]
        ST_PAPERS["Three-paper strategy<br/>1. Zenodo dataset deposit<br/>2. JOSS software paper<br/>3. WRR research paper"]
        ST_TIERS["Three-tier product output<br/>Screening: zero-shot, wide CIs<br/>Monitoring: N>=10, medium CIs<br/>Publication: N>=30, tight CIs"]
        ST_BIAS["Geographic bias identified<br/>CA+OR+KS = 50% of candidates<br/>Zero: loess belt, iron range, arid SW<br/>35-site gap-fill plan designed"]
    end

    V10 -->|"Shelved for future"| SHELVED
    subgraph SHELVED ["Investigated and Shelved"]
        direction TB
        SH_Q90["Q90 quantile specialist<br/>Tanaka red-team: shifts ALL<br/>predictions up, not just extremes<br/>149 extreme samples insufficient"]
        SH_WEPP["WEPP integration<br/>Physics-based erosion model<br/>Advisor area of work<br/>Paper 2 or 3"]
        SH_TEMPORAL["Temporal stationarity testing<br/>No year-over-year validation<br/>Required for deployment claims"]
    end

    subgraph LEGEND [" "]
        direction TB
        L1["Current production model"]
        L2["Contaminated / invalid"]
        L3["Dead end / failed"]
        L4["Breakthrough moment"]
        L5["Investigation cluster"]
        L6["Version milestone"]
        L7["Validated output"]
        L8["Scientific finding"]
        L9["Strategic decision"]
    end

    classDef current fill:#2d6a4f,stroke:#1b4332,color:#fff,stroke-width:3px
    classDef contaminated fill:#d62828,stroke:#6a040f,color:#fff,stroke-width:2px
    classDef dead fill:#6c757d,stroke:#495057,color:#fff
    classDef breakthrough fill:#e9c46a,stroke:#f4a261,color:#000,stroke-width:2px
    classDef cluster fill:#264653,stroke:#2a9d8f,color:#fff
    classDef milestone fill:#457b9d,stroke:#1d3557,color:#fff
    classDef output fill:#a7c957,stroke:#6a994e,color:#000
    classDef finding fill:#8ecae6,stroke:#219ebc,color:#000
    classDef strategic fill:#c77dff,stroke:#9d4edd,color:#fff

    class L1 current
    class L2 contaminated
    class L3 dead
    class L4 breakthrough
    class L5 cluster
    class L6 milestone
    class L7 output
    class L8 finding
    class L9 strategic

    class V10 current
    class V9 contaminated
    class V5,V6,V8GPB,V8MERF,MPARAM dead
    class LKGE,LSQRT,LLIN dead
    class TS1,TS2,TS3 dead
    class BCF_DUAN,BCF_BIN dead
    class SH_Q90,SH_WEPP dead
    class V8POST,AD_BAYES breakthrough
    class TS4,TS5,BCF_DUAL breakthrough
    class EXPA,EXPB,EXPC,EXPD,EXPE,D_NTU,D_ANCHOR cluster
    class ABL1,ABL2,ABL3 cluster
    class F_SGMC,F_WEATHER,F_LONLAT,F_COLLECT cluster
    class D_NOISE,D_CLEAN,D_3WAY cluster
    class POC,S17,S57,V1,V2,V3,V4,FEAS,AUDIT milestone
    class EXT1,EXT2 output
    class P_OLS,P_CI,P_CQR output
    class AD_OLD,AD_N20 dead
    class SC_BOUNDARY,SC_TURB,SC_SONG,SC_OLS,SC_IOWA,SC_GKF finding
    class ST_WRITE,ST_PAPERS,ST_TIERS,ST_BIAS strategic
    class SH_TEMPORAL dead
```

---

### Bug Discovery Timeline

Every bug that changed the project trajectory, in chronological order.

```{mermaid}
graph LR
    B1["Mar 16: Timezone<br/>Off by 5-8 hours<br/>R2 0.63 to 0.75"]
    B2["Mar 16: QC vectorization<br/>Qualifier matching<br/>silently skipped all filtering"]
    B3["Mar 16: Early-stop leakage<br/>Test data in validation set"]
    B4["Mar 17: Categorical dtype<br/>ecoregion, geology, huc2<br/>silently dropped<br/>R2 log 0.75 to 0.79"]
    B5["Mar 25: prune_gagesii<br/>Double-pruning destroyed<br/>ALL Tier C attributes<br/>Trained on zeros/NaN"]
    B6["Mar 25: DO saturation<br/>Linear approx 27-65% error<br/>Benson-Krause polynomial fix"]
    B7["Mar 28: QC approval codes<br/>A vs Approved mismatch<br/>139 sites wrongly rejected"]
    B8["Mar 28: Precip leakage<br/>precip_24h needed shift 1<br/>for strict antecedent"]
    B9["Mar 28: Dedup key<br/>int64 nanoseconds<br/>phantom duplicates"]
    B10["Mar 28: Weather timezone<br/>Strip tz before date compare"]
    B11["Mar 29: Lambda passthrough<br/>Saved model used MLE -0.049<br/>not 0.2 as intended"]
    B12["Mar 29: hash non-deterministic<br/>Python hash differs per session<br/>Adaptation not reproducible"]
    B13["Mar 30: Ablation flatline<br/>No early stopping<br/>38 features identical -0.22<br/>Gemini caught it"]
    B14["Mar 30: v9 contamination<br/>exclude-sites flag ignored<br/>Trained on holdout+vault<br/>ALL v9 evals invalid"]
    B15["Mar 30: Model overwriting<br/>Lost model versions<br/>Now versioned + git tracked"]
    B16["Mar 31: Seasonal split<br/>Produced identical to random<br/>Bug in split logic"]
    B17["Mar 31: BCF selection<br/>Wrong BCF applied in some paths"]
    B18["Mar 31: Quantile column names<br/>q05 vs q05_ms silently skipped<br/>coverage stats"]

    B1 --> B2 --> B3 --> B4 --> B5 --> B6
    B7 --> B8 --> B9 --> B10 --> B11 --> B12
    B13 --> B14 --> B15 --> B16 --> B17 --> B18

    subgraph BUGLEGEND [" "]
        direction TB
        BL1["Critical - invalidated results"]
        BL2["Major - changed model behavior"]
        BL3["Minor - caught and fixed"]
    end

    classDef critical fill:#d62828,stroke:#6a040f,color:#fff,stroke-width:2px
    classDef major fill:#e76f51,stroke:#c1440e,color:#fff
    classDef minor fill:#e9c46a,stroke:#f4a261,color:#000

    class BL1 critical
    class BL2 major
    class BL3 minor

    class B1,B5,B7,B14 critical
    class B4,B6,B11,B13,B16 major
    class B2,B3,B8,B9,B10,B12,B15,B17,B18 minor
```

---

### Project State Transitions

The narrative arc -- how the project evolved through eras, with the key trigger at each transition.

```{mermaid}
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> feasibility

    state "Feasibility (Mar 15)" as feasibility
    feasibility --> early_models : Kansas 5-site test validates concept

    state "Early Models (Mar 16-17)" as early_models {
        poc : POC 3 sites, R2=0.92
        s17 : 17-site cross-site, R2=0.84
        audit : 4-reviewer audit finds 4 bugs
        s57 : 57-site post-audit, R2=0.75
        ext14 : 14-state external validation

        poc --> s17
        s17 --> audit
        audit --> s57
        s57 --> ext14
    }

    early_models --> log1p_era : Expand to 102 sites

    state "log1p Era (Mar 17-28)" as log1p_era {
        gagesii_bug : prune_gagesii destroys all attributes
        streamcat : StreamCat replaces GAGES-II
        expand : 266 to 396 sites via QC fix
        collapse : Native R2 collapses 0.361 to 0.154

        gagesii_bug --> streamcat
        streamcat --> expand
        expand --> collapse
    }

    log1p_era --> transform_crisis : v3 native R2 = 0.154

    state "Transform Crisis (Mar 28)" as transform_crisis {
        sweep24 : 24-experiment sweep
        boxcox_wins : Box-Cox 0.2 + monotone wins
        raw_fails : Raw SSC R2 under 0.012, ruled out

        sweep24 --> boxcox_wins
        sweep24 --> raw_fails
    }

    transform_crisis --> v4_platform : v4 Holdout=0.472

    state "v4 Stable Platform (Mar 28-30)" as v4_platform {
        arch : Architecture search, 4 approaches
        exps : Experiments A-E, 30+ models
        ablation : Feature ablation, 3 rounds
        loss : Loss function experiments
        bayesian : Bayesian shrinkage BREAKTHROUGH
        meta : Site heterogeneity is THE problem
        feat72 : 72 features locked by expert panel

        arch --> bayesian
        exps --> meta
        ablation --> feat72
    }

    v4_platform --> integration : Combine all findings

    state "Integration (Mar 30)" as integration {
        v9_build : v9 assembled with all improvements
        contaminated : CONTAMINATED, trained on holdout
        ntu_reject : NTU investigated and rejected
        noise_keep : Noise sites carry extreme signal
        dual_bcf : Dual BCF discovered
        v10_clean : v10 clean rebuild

        v9_build --> contaminated
        contaminated --> v10_clean
        ntu_reject --> v10_clean
        noise_keep --> v10_clean
        dual_bcf --> v10_clean
    }

    integration --> paper_ready : v10 = current best

    state "Paper Ready (Mar 31+)" as paper_ready {
        ols : OLS benchmark, wins at every N
        ci : Bootstrap CIs, 1000 resamples
        cqr : CQR MultiQuantile training
        ext260 : 260 NTU sites, Spearman=0.927
    }
```

---

### Chronological Project Timeline

Day-by-day progression showing what happened and what was learned.

```{mermaid}
gantt
    title murkml Development Timeline (Mar 15-31, 2026)
    dateFormat YYYY-MM-DD
    axisFormat %b %d

    section Foundation
    Project setup + Kansas feasibility     :done, 2026-03-15, 1d
    POC 3 sites + 17-site cross-site       :done, 2026-03-16, 1d
    4-reviewer code audit, timezone fix     :crit, done, 2026-03-16, 1d
    57-site post-audit baseline             :done, 2026-03-16, 1d
    14-state external validation            :done, 2026-03-17, 1d
    102-site expansion, categorical fix     :done, 2026-03-17, 1d
    Panel fixes, flow-strat, GAGES vintage  :done, 2026-03-18, 1d

    section Pipeline Overhaul
    prune_gagesii bug + DO fix discovered   :crit, done, 2026-03-25, 1d
    StreamCat migration + site qualification:done, 2026-03-26, 1d
    Site adaptation + conformal intervals   :done, 2026-03-26, 1d
    USGS OLS comparison + error analysis    :done, 2026-03-26, 1d

    section Transform + Expansion
    Data expansion 266 to 396 sites         :done, 2026-03-28, 1d
    Transform sweep 24 experiments          :done, 2026-03-28, 1d
    Box-Cox 0.2 selected, v4 established    :milestone, done, 2026-03-28, 0d
    Feature ablation Round 1                :done, 2026-03-28, 1d

    section Experiments + Breakthrough
    Experiments A-E, 30+ models             :done, 2026-03-29, 1d
    MERF tested then abandoned              :done, 2026-03-29, 1d
    Bayesian shrinkage BREAKTHROUGH         :crit, done, 2026-03-29, 1d
    Phase 3 pipeline fixes, SGMC, methods   :done, 2026-03-29, 1d
    Phase 4 diagnostics + external NTU      :done, 2026-03-29, 1d

    section v9 to v10
    Phase 5 ablation, 83 models             :done, 2026-03-30, 1d
    Feature freeze at 72, expert panel      :milestone, done, 2026-03-30, 0d
    v9 assembled then CONTAMINATED          :crit, done, 2026-03-30, 1d
    NTU investigation, noise site analysis  :done, 2026-03-30, 1d
    Dual BCF discovery                      :done, 2026-03-30, 1d
    v10 clean rebuild                       :milestone, done, 2026-03-30, 0d

    section Paper Prep
    v10 holdout eval + DECISION_LOG         :done, 2026-03-31, 1d
    OLS benchmark + Bootstrap CIs           :done, 2026-03-31, 1d
    CQR MultiQuantile training              :active, 2026-03-31, 1d
```

---

## How to Read These Diagrams

**Diagram 1 (Model Evolution DAG)** -- The comprehensive map. Every model version, every investigation branch, every dead end. Follow the main spine from Kansas Feasibility down to v10. Dotted arrows show where investigation findings feed back into the spine. Color legend is in the bottom-right of the diagram.

**Diagram 2 (Bug Timeline)** -- The 18 bugs that shaped the project. Left to right, chronological. Three rows because they came in waves. Color legend is at the bottom.

**Diagram 3 (State Transitions)** -- The narrative arc. How the project evolved through eras, with nested details inside each state. Best for understanding the *story* of the project.

**Diagram 4 (Gantt Timeline)** -- Day-by-day chronological view. Shows how much happened in parallel and where the critical moments fell.

### The Meta-Finding

The project began as a 5-site feasibility test and grew to 254 training sites + 76 holdout + 36 vault in 17 days. The central discovery is that **site heterogeneity is THE problem** -- between-site SSC/turb ratio CV is 3.2x larger than within-site. No architecture, feature, or training change fixes this. The only approach that works is **Bayesian site adaptation** (Student-t shrinkage), which is both the scientific finding and the commercial product.

18 bugs were discovered and fixed along the way. 4 were critical enough to invalidate prior results. The project survived because of systematic practices: red-team reviews (human + Gemini), expert panels, multi-metric evaluation, and the principle of never overwriting model files.
